commands.review_summary:
Changes package publishing to require multipart/form-data, derive package file/artifact metadata server-side, update CLI and browser plugin publish flows, lower multipart upload limits, and document/test the boundary.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR review rather than a bug report, and I did not run a current-main reproduction. Source inspection confirms the proposed behavior and the compatibility/security-boundary risks.
